title: Now if Gendo would only change his name to Mike
display_title: Now if Gendo would only change his name to Mike
wikitext:
[]: Now if Gendo would only change his name to Mike...             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:22 am Has anyone else noticed Yui's ugly Florence Henderson mullet? I was looking at the cover of Volume 8 of the manga and just started laughing. Figure 1.1-- Yui mullet Figure 1.2-- Florence mullet They should do an Eva version of the Brady Bunch.

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:28 am Oh that's frigtening. But then manga-Yui never looked quite right :?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:34 am An evangelion version of brady bunch....a very interesting idea, I hardly ever watched that show so I don't know how many brady kids there were. But given how many kids there are in eva there should be more then enough to fill all the roles.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:59 am I rather like Yui's hairstyle. Go fig. :)

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 3:28 pm Look no further folks, for I bring you the latest in prime time entertainment!!!!!!! THE EVA BUNCH!!!!!!! [URL=http://www.imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 7:18 pm Where the hell is Alice?

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 8:21 pm yeah i know. Ritsuko was supposed to be alice in the middle. but I had to put the name there so I couldn't put her in. oh well..

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 03, 2005 9:15 pm No, no, no, Fuyutski is Alice

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 9:54 pm RuaDragon wrote: No, no, no, Fuyutski is Alice

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:09 pm lolz, just so you guys know I didn't try matching up any characters with the brady characters, etc. I just took my fav characters from eva and put them in boxes like the opening of the show. so it's probably wrong, but it still kicks ass

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 03, 2005 10:35 pm *pukes at the thought*

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 04, 2005 1:08 pm somehow, i just dont think that would work and i also like the manga yui's hairstyle

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 04, 2005 3:16 pm Were you guys actually thinking that I was serious about an Evangelion Brady Bunch? Sheesh... :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Jul 06, 2005 4:37 am Mr. Bud wrote: Were you guys actually thinking that I was serious about an Evangelion Brady Bunch? Sheesh... :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 06, 2005 7:06 am For your amusement, here's an attempt of mine to make Sadamoto's Yui a bit more... palatable. Side-by-side with the original for convenience. I think it's a big improvement, anyhow.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Wed Jul 06, 2005 9:27 am Yeah, it's better. I always thought her mouth on that manga cover looked weird too. The 'mullet' part of her hair needs to be shorter and less strait. That way it's not a mullet anymore. Now turn Touji back to his normal, non red-headed self.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 06, 2005 10:44 am well...the manga does screw around with the plot and creates a completely (well...maybe not completely) different storyline how did the manga skip over several of the angel attacks? ( i think that matriel (spider guy) was missing)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Wed Jul 06, 2005 11:22 am So was Sandalphon. Iruel... Leliel...

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sat Jul 09, 2005 3:04 pm Rob, that was the funniest shit ive seen in a while, u da man 4 now.. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 10, 2005 4:19 am Reichu wrote: For your amusement, here's an attempt of mine to make Sadamoto's Yui a bit more... palatable. Side-by-side with the original for convenience. I think it's a big improvement, anyhow.
